title: MagicItems
description: Minecraft plugin that adds magical items to your minecraft world.
body:
# MagicItems - Minecraft Plugin
This plugin adds a variety of amazing items, through just the Spigot Api.

> All items are randomly generated.

## Supported items
  - *All armor types*
  - *Swords*
  - *Axes*
  - *Bows*
  - *Crossbows*

All special items have a 7% chance to contain an ancient scroll which gives the item special ability.

## Current list of Scrolls
  - Cloud Boost ⭐
  - Fire Ring 🔥
  - Lightning Strike ⚡
  - Shriek Missile (Range Only) 🏹
  - Instant Heal ❤️

Special items can be obtained only from random chests or mob drops. You can also convert vanilla items using ```/roll``` command.

![](https://imgur.com/xxUXXpT.png)
![](https://imgur.com/wCEazN1.png)
